entities.name: AI Productivity Multiplier
entities.context: V's belief that AI tools create a real and substantial productivity multiplier for individuals

entities.name: AI-Augmented Individual Effectiveness
entities.context: Position that a single well-trained person with AI can match the output of several non-AI-enabled individuals

entities.name: LLMs
entities.context: Large Language Models described as shockingly efficient when given right prompts and well-scoped data

entities.name: White Collar Workforce Displacement
entities.context: V's view that white collar workers face the reality of AI competition whether they acknowledge it or not

entities.name: AI Automation
entities.context: The broader domain this position belongs to

entities.name: Prompt Engineering
entities.context: Implied skill of giving LLMs the right prompts to unlock efficiency

entities.name: Competitive Adaptation Imperative
entities.context: Stakes position: those who don't adapt will be outcompeted by smaller AI-augmented teams

relationships.context: LLMs are the mechanism that delivers the productivity multiplier when properly prompted
Core position within V's ai-automation domain
Individual effectiveness gains directly create displacement pressure on non-augmented workers
The effectiveness gap creates existential competitive pressure to adapt
Right prompts and well-scoped data unlock LLM efficiency
The multiplier effect raises stakes — smaller augmented teams outcompete larger traditional ones
